name: Kitchen
description: Kitchen remodels, cabinet work, countertops, islands, and appliance upgrades.

name: Bathroom
description: Full remodels, shower and tub work, tile, vanities, and accessibility conversions.

name: Exterior
description: Roofing, siding, windows, doors, gutters, painting, and curb appeal upgrades.

name: Basement
description: Finishing, waterproofing, egress windows, home theaters, and basement bathrooms.

name: Flooring
description: Hardwood, laminate, vinyl plank, tile, carpet, and specialty floor installations.

name: HVAC & Energy
description: Heating, cooling, insulation, solar panels, water heaters, and energy efficiency.

name: Plumbing
description: Repiping, water mains, sewer lines, water treatment, and fixture installations.

name: Electrical
description: Panel upgrades, rewiring, lighting, ceiling fans, and smart home electrical work.

name: Structural
description: Room additions, foundation repair, load-bearing wall removal, and major renovations.

name: Painting & Walls
description: Interior and exterior painting, wallpaper, drywall, crown molding, and accent walls.

name: Outdoor Living
description: Pools, patios, decks, fire pits, outdoor kitchens, sheds, and landscaping.

name: Smart Home & Tech
description: Smart wiring, home automation, audio systems, motorized shades, and security tech.
